target.title: feat(feishu): customizable card header and footer
target.body:
## Feishu: customizable card header and footer

Adds `channels.feishu.card.header.*` and `channels.feishu.card.footer.*` so users can choose any supported header template, hide the agent emoji, suppress the header bar entirely, and pick which fields appear in the footer (Agent ID, model, provider). Available at both top level and per account.

### Why

Today the Feishu reply dispatcher always emits a blue-themed header with the agent emoji and an `Agent | Model | Provider` footer note. Users running OpenClaw on Lark for end-customer-facing accounts have asked to suppress the metadata footer (which leaks the underlying model/provider) and to match a brand color. `send.ts` already supports 13 templates — only the dispatcher was hardcoded to blue via `identity.theme`.

### What changed

- **`extensions/feishu/src/config-schema.ts`** — new `FeishuCardConfigSchema` (header + footer blocks) added to `FeishuSharedConfigShape` so it accepts at top level and per account. Template enum mirrors `FEISHU_CARD_TEMPLATES` in `send.ts` with a sync comment.
- **`extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.ts`** — `resolveCardHeader` / `resolveCardNote` now take a `FeishuCardConfig` (inferred from the Zod schema). The dispatcher caches `account.config?.card` once and threads it to all three card construction sites (streaming start, streaming close-with-finalNote, non-streaming structured card). This matches how `renderMode`, `streaming`, and `typingIndicator` already resolve account-level overrides.
- **Tests** — schema tests cover defaults, the full template allowlist, rejection of unknown templates, and account-level config. Dispatcher tests cover header disabled, footer disabled, the three footer toggles, and the header `showEmoji=false` + non-blue template path.
- **Docs** — new "Card header and footer" section in `docs/channels/feishu.md` with the full template list, defaults table rows, and a per-account override example.

### Backward compatibility

Defaults reproduce the prior output byte-for-byte: header on, emoji on, `"blue"` template, footer on with model and provider, Agent ID hidden. Configs that never set `channels.feishu.card` are unaffected.

### Validation

- `pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-feishu.config.ts extensions/feishu/src/config-schema.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts` → **61 / 61 pass**
- `pnpm exec oxlint --type-aware` on touched source files → 0 warnings / 0 errors
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check` on touched files → clean
- Full `pnpm test:extension feishu` lane: 60 / 62 files pass; the 2 failures (`docx.test.ts` Windows path-format assertions, `monitor.webhook-security.test.ts` ECONNRESET) live in untouched files and reproduce on `origin/main`.

### AI-assisted PR checklist

- [x] AI-assisted (Claude / Claude Code)
- [x] Fully tested — 61 unit tests pass; no manual gateway run yet
- [x] I understand what the code does
- [ ] `codex review --base origin/main` — not available in my environment; happy to run if a maintainer requests
- [x] Will resolve / reply to bot review conversations as they appear

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: noor-ul-ain001
